历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16220 → 10890 → 12526 → 13723 → 13949. In 2022, it moved significantly forward, then gradually moved backward in subsequent years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3059 positions over the last three years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 13949. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 47 in 2021, 48 each year from 2022 to 2024, and 49 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 54, an increase of about 10.2% compared to 2025, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Soft Science main ranking approximately 84th (2026), with recent rankings fluctuating slightly between 75 and 84, overall stable. The university's reputation has been steady in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin attention is moderate, with no records of enrollment gaps, and no obvious psychological disturbance in application behavior. Electrical Engineering is rated A (top nationally), Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics rated A-, highly aligned with the power industry, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Electrical Engineering and Automation continues to heat up (highly recommended in 2024), and Energy and Power majors are also recommended. The total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province for 2026 is about 209,000, slightly down from about 213,000 in 2025, easing competition slightly. The university is located in Beijing, not a provincial university. Chongqing candidates have a strong regional preference for Beijing universities, but the university's enrollment share in this province is about 2.5% (2025), which is normal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline of 13949, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 10.2% (ranking shift backward by about 854), a slight decrease in total examinees (slightly eased competition), and the continued heating up of the top electrical major, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14753, with a range of 14253 to 15253.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14253–15253, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 14000), you can aim for top majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation and Smart Grid Information Engineering. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 14700), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Automation, Energy and Power, and Communication Engineering. If your ranking is near the upper bound (above 15000), it is recommended to rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型及历年位次趋势，预测2026年湖南师范大学医学类最低录取位次约为23489名，较2025年（23889名）略有上升（位次数字减小），波动区间为22989至23989名 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking for Hunan Normal University's medical category in Fujian Province was 14498 in 2021 (planned 12 students), 13703 in 2024 (planned 4 students), and dropped significantly to 23889 in 2025 (planned 6 students). No separate medical data for 2022 and 2023. The sharp decline in 2025 was mainly due to adjustments in medical major groups and changes in candidates' willingness to apply. The 2026 enrollment plan for medical category is 6 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province. It is a key construction university under the 211 Project and also selected as a national Double First-Class construction university. The university's medical department (Xianjiahu Campus) has a long history, with relatively outstanding medical strength among normal universities. Clinical Medicine, Preventive Medicine, and other majors have a certain degree of recognition in Fujian Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, medical majors have maintained high popularity nationwide, with Clinical Medicine being particularly sought after. The enrollment scale for medical categories in Fujian Province is relatively limited. Hunan Normal University's medical category only recruits three majors—Clinical Medicine, Preventive Medicine, and Pharmacy—with a total of 6 students, leading to concentrated competition. After the significant drop in rankings in 2025, a slight rebound may occur in 2026, as candidates pay more attention to lower rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Hunan Normal University's medical category in 2026 is approximately 23489, slightly higher than 2025's 23889 (ranking number decreases), with a fluctuation range of 22989 to 23989.
